compiled_state.title: 30c0-6d16: Task B — Add INTENT_CONFLICT handling to fix-bug Step 1.5 and update Step 1.7
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
30c0-6d16 — fix-bug Gate 1a pauses investigation when intent-search detects conflicting caller usage

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## TDD (GREEN phase — makes Task A tests pass)
Modify plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md Step 1.5 to add INTENT_CONFLICT as 4th terminal outcome and update Step 1.7 to include intent-conflict in the skip condition. All 5 tests in test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh turn GREEN after this task.

## File to Modify
plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md

## Required Changes

### Step 1.5: Add INTENT_CONFLICT as 4th terminal outcome

In the outcomes section of Step 1.5 (Gate 1a outcomes), after the 'ambiguous' outcome bullet, add:

**4th outcome — intent-conflict** (triggered: true, additional fields: behavioral_claim, conflicting_callers, dependency_classification)

When intent-search emits INTENT_CONFLICT (triggered=true with behavioral_claim and conflicting_callers fields), investigation PAUSES. Set GATE_1A_RESULT='intent-conflict'.

Present the user with:
- The behavioral_claim from the agent (what the ticket says should happen)
- The conflicting_callers list (callers that depend on the current behavior)
- The dependency_classification (behavioral_dependency or incidental_usage)
- Three resolution options:
  1. **Confirm ticket correct** — proceed to Step 2 investigation with the ticket as-is
  2. **Confirm current behavior correct** — close the ticket (behavior is intentional; callers depend on it)
  3. **Revise ticket description** — allow user to update the ticket text, then re-run Gate 1a

Non-interactive mode handling:
- When FIX_BUG_INTERACTIVE=false: defer as INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED ticket comment; proceed to Step 2 with the ticket's stated behavior as safe default (do not block investigation)

This outcome is TERMINAL — like intent-contradicting, it skips Gate 1b.

### Step 1.7: Update Gate 1b conditional

In the Step 1.7 section, update the 'When to run' condition to handle the 4th case:
- BEFORE: 'Only when GATE_1A_RESULT=ambiguous. Skip to Step 2 immediately if GATE_1A_RESULT is intent-aligned or intent-contradicting.'
- AFTER: 'Only when GATE_1A_RESULT=ambiguous. Skip to Step 2 immediately if GATE_1A_RESULT is intent-aligned, intent-contradicting, OR intent-conflict.'

## .test-index Update (REQUIRED)
Remove RED marker [test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists]:
- BEFORE: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh [test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists]
- AFTER: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 'intent-conflict' outcome documented in fix-bug/SKILL.md Step 1.5
  Verify: grep -q 'intent-conflict' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Three resolution options documented near INTENT_CONFLICT handling
  Verify: grep -q 'confirm ticket correct\|confirm current behavior\|revise ticket description' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] GATE_1A_RESULT assigned intent-conflict
  Verify: grep -q "GATE_1A_RESULT.*intent-conflict\|intent-conflict.*GATE_1A_RESULT" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Step 1.7 updated to skip Gate 1b for intent-conflict
  Verify: grep -A5 'Step 1.7\|Gate 1b' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent-conflict'
- [ ] Non-interactive INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED handling for intent-conflict
  Verify: grep -B2 -A2 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md | grep -q 'intent-conflict'
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && ! grep 'test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh.*\[test_intent_conflict_outcome_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All 5 tests in test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'PASS:' | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
